Description.SourceString: High explosive grenade with a proximity fuse.
Description.LocalizedString: High explosive grenade with a proximity fuse.

Description.SourceString: A heavy cannon capable of dealing high damage.
Description.LocalizedString: A heavy cannon capable of dealing high damage.

Description.SourceString: Multi-barrel machine gun with extremely high rate of fire
Description.LocalizedString: Multi-barrel machine gun with extremely high rate of fire

Description.SourceString: Drum magazine allows more small HE grenades to be loaded.
Description.LocalizedString: Drum magazine allows more small HE grenades to be loaded.

Description.SourceString: Fire faster-flying high explosive grenades at slower rates of fire
Description.LocalizedString: Fire faster-flying high explosive grenades at slower rates of fire

Description.SourceString: Big fearsome grenade that deals immense damage with one shot.
Description.LocalizedString: Big fearsome grenade that deals immense damage with one shot.

Description.SourceString: Two mode guided missile.
Description.LocalizedString: Two mode guided missile.

Description.SourceString: When an enemy is marked it will automatically activate and when activated the use will fire 5 infra-red guided missiles to automatically track the marked enemy.
Description.LocalizedString: When an enemy is marked it will automatically activate and when activated the use will fire 5 infra-red guided missiles to automatically track the marked enemy.

Description.SourceString: Deploy 3 Electro-static smoke screen grenades. Can effectively obscure the enemy's line of sight and recon device.
Description.LocalizedString: Deploy 3 Electro-static smoke screen grenades. Can effectively obscure the enemy's line of sight and recon device.

Description.SourceString: Immediately deploy a smoke grenade around player.
Description.LocalizedString: Immediately deploy a smoke grenade around player.

Description.SourceString: EMP grenade with a proximity fuse. able to temporarily paralyze the enemy within range.
Description.LocalizedString: EMP grenade with a proximity fuse. able to temporarily paralyze the enemy within range.

Description.SourceString: EMP grenade with a proximity fuse. able to temporarily paralyze the enemy within range.
Description.LocalizedString: EMP grenade with a proximity fuse. able to temporarily paralyze the enemy within range.

Description.SourceString: Automatically detonates when the enemy approaches, and can paralyze the enemy for a period of time
Description.LocalizedString: Automatically detonates when the enemy approaches, and can paralyze the enemy for a period of time

Description.SourceString: EMP grenade with a proximity fuse. able to temporarily paralyze the enemy within range.
Description.LocalizedString: EMP grenade with a proximity fuse. able to temporarily paralyze the enemy within range.

Description.SourceString: Applies an impact to players within range of the explosion, causing them to move
Description.LocalizedString: Applies an impact to players within range of the explosion, causing them to move

Description.SourceString: Active-Defence System will intercept any hostile flying object within range.
Description.LocalizedString: Active-Defence System will intercept any hostile flying object within range.

Description.SourceString: The MED is able to automatically repair the spacesuits of the teammates nearby.
Description.LocalizedString: The MED is able to automatically repair the spacesuits of the teammates nearby.

Description.SourceString: Probes will mark enemies nearby after deployed.
Description.LocalizedString: Probes will mark enemies nearby after deployed.

Description.SourceString: Activated by pressing the right button (LT), activation will mark all enemies within visible range.
Description.LocalizedString: Activated by pressing the right button (LT), activation will mark all enemies within visible range.

Description.SourceString: When an enemy passes near the motion sensor, the sensor will sound an alarm.
Description.LocalizedString: When an enemy passes near the motion sensor, the sensor will sound an alarm.
